title: Driven by Battat – Big City Cruisin' Pocket Playset – 7-Piece Toy Set with Taxi, Building, Ramps & Road Signs – Compact Car Playset for Kids Ages 3+
features: Includes: 1 building, 1 taxi, 3 ramps, and 2 signs
Features: Elevator lifts cars to higher levels, ramps to drive around the set
Sturdy and durable: These tough toys are built for real play and do not break easily
Design: Realistic details encourage imagination and role-playing skills
Compatibility: Tracks go with other toys in the Pocket Series
description: From the manufacturer DRIVEN by Battat – Big City Cruisin' Head into the heart of the action with the Big City Cruisin’ playset from DRIVEN by Battat! This toy set includes a car and a building you can drive through, as well as various ramps and road signs. Collect all the playsets in the Pocket Series for hours of fun! DRIVEN by Battat: Tough trucks and work vehicles taking play to new places DRIVEN Series Check out all the DRIVEN Series: Standard, Midrange, Micro, and Pocket! These trucks, cars, and other vehicles transport you to a world of action. Whether you’re driving a police car, towing a truck, or flying a helicopter, you can be in charge of your very own mission, just like your real-life heroes! DRIVEN Turbocharge Start your engines and get ready to Turbocharge! These toy sets are all about high speeds and electrifying stunts, taking toy car racing to a new extreme. Kick off on the launch ramp and watch out for those hairpin turns! Can you cross the finish line first? DRIVEN Playsets Explore the DRIVEN range of playsets, which are jam-packed with detailed accessories for hours of activities! Want to take a trip to the airport? How about a day at a construction site? Well, what are you waiting for? Grab your hard hat and let’s get to work!
